text.title: Design Tokens Fundamentals Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

conclusion.verdict: apply three-tier DTCG architecture with baked a11y
lighter token layer or direct CSS variables suffice

example.trace: web+iOS+light+dark → 4 combinations → three-tier with semantic overrides per theme

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
